name: EuiProgress
description: Linear determinate or indeterminate progress indicator.

max.description: When set, creates determinate progress with a value/max ratio

labelProps.description: Object of props passed to the <span/> wrapping the determinate progress's label

valueText.description:
Displays custom text or percentage
Pass `true` to display the percentage value
Pass a ReactNode for custom text

aria-label.description:
Defines a string value that labels the current element.
@see aria-labelledby.

color.description: One of EUI's color palette, vis colors or a valid CSS color value https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/color_value
